lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level out of range
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect

DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter.comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter.comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

DTCExtendedData.Mileage.comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

OutputControlCommand.comment: Commande de test : Paramètre de pilotage

OutputPermanentControlList.comment: Commande de test : Liste des commandes

lists.3: Parking Braking working, No smart card

ClusterProductionDate _ ASCII.comment: numéro de série unique du tdb

ClusterProductionNumber _ ASCII.comment: numéro de série unique du tdb

lists.0: No Config MPU Day Running Light
lists.16: With Config MPU Day Running Light

lists.0: No Config MPU Single Door Opening
lists.16: With Config MPU Single Door Opening

Config Gauge_Threshold.Max level.comment: Seuil haut L1 pour stratégie de jaugeage

Config Gauge_Threshold.Min level.comment: Seuil Bas L1 pour stratégie de jaugeage

Wire Input_Fuel Level L0.comment: Tension batterie lors de la mesure de la jauge carburant

Wire Input_Engine Oil.Battery U1.comment: Tension batterie pendant la 1ère mesure du niveau d'huile

Wire Input_Engine Oil.Battery U2.comment: Tension batterie pendant la 2ème mesure du niveau d'huile

Wire Input_Engine Oil.Mesure Delta U.comment: Delta de tension de sonde  NH entre t1 et t2

lists.1: L2  is initialize with normal APC on.
lists.2: L2 is initialized with L2enAPC threshold
lists.3: L2 is initialized with L2off threshold
lists.4: L2 is initialized with L3 threshold then
lists.5: L2 is initialized with diag service
lists.6: If L2 is updated after injection failure exit
lists.7: L2 is updated after Fuel Gauge failure exit
lists.8: L2 is in Missing Injection Frame Mode
lists.9: L2 is in Fuel Gauge Failure Mode
lists.10: L2 is initialized with Flag Memo

lists.1: Measure done due to time since last APC  < 1 mn
Battery voltage too low to make measurement
Measurement impossible because sensor in CO
Measurement impossible because sensor in CC
No Measurement,sensor out of range (3-20 ohms)

lists.0: No memorised failure : Fuel Gauge CO
No Current Failure : Fuel Gauge CO
No Memorized Failure : Fuel Gauge CC
No Current Failure : Fuel Gauge CC
No Memorized Failure : Missing frame MMI_ECM
No Current Failure : Missing frame MMI_ECM
